articles.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly Erupts After CM Vijay's Blistering Speech Against DMK & AIADMK | News18
articles.description: A heated political confrontation unfolded in the Tamil Nadu Assembly as Chief Minister Vijay launched a blistering attack on both the DMK and AIADMK during his address. His sharp remarks triggered strong reactions from opposition members, leading to loud protests, heated exchanges, and scenes of chaos inside the House. The dramatic session highlighted the intensifying political battle in Tamil Nadu as parties gear up for future electoral contests. n18oc_breaking-newsNews18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube

articles.title: Angelina Jolie admits she's been single for 10 years after Brad Pitt split: 'Life has broken me a little bit'
articles.description: Angelina Jolie has revealed she hasn't dated since her divorce from Brad Pitt nearly a decade ago, prioritizing her six children. Her new film, *Couture*, prompted reflection on love and identity. Jolie feels a desire to live more freely again, inspired by her daughters' strength. Meanwhile, Brad Pitt is reportedly moving forward with his relationship with Ines de Ramon.

articles.title: Rare red heat warning issued: UK braces for hottest June day on record as temperatures near 40°C
articles.description: June is set to bring fierce heat to the UK, with soaring temperatures possibly hitting nearly 40°C. In response, a rare red alert has been issued by the Met Office along with a health warning. This intense heat poses threats to citizens' wellbeing and infrastructure as the region is enveloped by a heat dome affecting Europe. Authorities stress the risks of heat-related illnesses, particularly in humid conditions.

articles.title: RBI’s message to banks: Treat MSMEs as business partners, not regulatory burden

articles.title: NFO Alert: JM Financial Mutual Fund launches multi asset allocation fund
articles.description: JM Financial Mutual Fund has launched its new JM Multi Asset Allocation Fund, an open-ended scheme designed for long-term wealth creation. Subscriptions open June 24 and close July 8, 2026. This fund offers a diversified portfolio across equity, debt, gold/silver, and commodity derivatives, aiming for growth with a structured, actively managed approach to navigate various market cycles and economic conditions.

articles.title: ET Graphics: The crown in 2025 goes to a royal whisky brand
articles.description: In a significant shift, Royal Stag has claimed the title of the world's largest-selling whisky brand by volume, dethroning McDowell's after a decade. This milestone highlights the surging growth of Indian-made foreign liquor, which now constitutes over 25% of global large spirits brands. Six of the top ten whisky brands are now Indian, underscoring the nation's growing influence in the international spirits market.

articles.title: Lucknow fire: President Murmu, Rahul Gandhi condole loss of lives
articles.description: A devastating fire at a coaching institute in Lucknow claimed multiple lives. President Murmu, Rahul Gandhi, and other leaders expressed condolences. UP CM Yogi Adityanath ordered a high-level inquiry and rushed back to the city.

articles.title: Delhi CM meets tragedy victims' kin, provides ₹10 lakh ex-gratia
articles.description: Delhi CM Rekha Gupta met families of victims from the Saidulajab building collapse and Hauz Rani fire. She provided ₹10 lakh ex-gratia assistance to each family and assured them of strict action against those found guilty.

articles.title: Lucknow coaching centre fire: PM Modi announces Rs 2 lakh ex-gratia
articles.description: A fire at a Lucknow coaching institute claimed 14 lives. PM Modi announced Rs 2 lakh ex-gratia for the deceased's kin. CM Yogi Adityanath visited the site and ordered a probe. Other leaders also expressed condolences for the tragic incident.
